source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Grounded knowledge UI with sturdy English hierarchy, careful numbers, and Japanese typography guidance.
layout: Structured knowledge grids, acorn cap texture, oak-leaf navigation, 8px radii, firm borders, and readable tables.

prompts.label: Transparent acorn and oak leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Acorn transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an acorn and oak leaf motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An oak woodland acorn with oak-brown nut, textured tan cap, short stem, lobed leaf-green oak leaf, warm soil-brown shadows, and natural shell highlights. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, grounded woodland texture, unmistakably acorn.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include acorn, cap texture, stem, and lobed oak leaf without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no chestnut, no hazelnut, no pinecone, no maple seed, no squirrel, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Acorn light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Acorn", derived from the visible acorn and oak leaf cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible grounded knowledge UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Acorn, Acorn and Oak Leaf, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from oak-brown shell, tan textured cap, lobed leaf green, woodland cream highlights, soil-brown depth, and sturdy acorn geometry. The board must read as acorn, not chestnut, hazelnut, pinecone, or maple seed.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, woodland-cream surfaces, oak-brown primary actions, acorn-tan secondary states, cap-umber badges, leaf-green success states, soil-brown borders, acorn cap stipple texture.
Constraints: no chestnut identity, no hazelnut, no pinecone scales, no maple seed wings, no generic brown-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Acorn", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Acorn dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Acorn". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the acorn and oak leaf cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Acorn, Acorn and Oak Leaf, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve acorn system language: oak-brown active states, acorn-tan highlights, cap-umber texture, leaf-green controls, shell-cream text, soil-brown borders, stippled cap texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as acorn, not chestnut, hazelnut, pinecone, or maple seed.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep oak ink and soil-brown dark surfaces, shell-cream foreground, oak-brown active states, acorn-tan chart highlights, leaf green focus/control accents, subtle cap-stipple overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no chestnut identity, no hazelnut, no pinecone scales, no maple seed wings, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Acorn".
